query:
-- 更新contractStatus为active
UPDATE partner_cities 
SET contractStatus = 'active'
WHERE partnerId = 30002;

-- 验证更新结果
SELECT 
  pc.partnerId,
  c.name as cityName,
  pc.contractStatus,
  CASE 
    WHEN pc.contractStatus = 'active' THEN 'MATCH'
    ELSE 'NOT_MATCH'
  END as status_check
FROM partner_cities pc
JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE pc.partnerId = 30002;
